{{Quote|Now, why don't you untie me? Unless you ''like'' this sort of thing?|Nescan Tal'yo, after being tied up and interrogated by [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]|<ref name="Lucky Stars">{{Tales|15|Lucky Stars}}</ref>}}
'''Nescan Tal'yo''' was a wolf-like [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]]. His bodyguard was [[Hermos (droid)|Hermos]]. He killed a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] courier on [[Farwell Station]] and captured a holocube detailing the locations of the Rebellion's main bases. He planned to sell the cube to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] on [[Elerion]] to make himself rich, but his plan was foiled by [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and the [[Quetzal Sisters]].
